falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 Index closes above 5,200 (a 10% increase from current levels) for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained upward breakout would contradict the pattern's bearish implications and invalidate the HOLD signal by indicating a potential reversal in trend

falsification_conditions.condition: The 14-day trading volume on the NASDAQ exceeds 200% of the 60-day average volume
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Abnormal volume spikes would indicate forced buying/selling pressure, directly contradicting the pattern's expectation of consolidation and invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict

falsification_conditions.condition: The Federal Reserve announces a 50-basis-point rate cut in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sudden major policy shift would introduce new variables not accounted for in the pattern match, directly falsifying the current macro engine's assumptions

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
